description: During a recent data migration, the personal details for three employees (Dario Rossi, Mei Chen, and Sven Olson) were corrupted to system defaults. Update their records in the PIM module with the following information: Dario Rossi (DOB: 1985-05-15, Marital Status: Married, Nationality: Italian, Gender: Male); Mei Chen (DOB: 1990-11-20, Marital Status: Single, Nationality: Chinese, Gender: Female); and Sven Olson (DOB: 1982-03-10, Marital Status: Married, Nationality: Swedish, License Expiry Date: 2027-05-20).
